arts.ttl: Manchester United loanee Antony declares happiness at Real Betis, reveals he is 'waking up with a smile'
arts.sum: Manchester United winger Antony declares that he has found happiness on loan at Real Betis after his prolonged woes at Old Trafford.

arts.ttl: Preview: Real Betis vs. Gent - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Thursday's Conference League clash between Real Betis and Gent, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
